title: FLOKI (FLOKI) Price Forecast & Scenarios
content:

## Current Performance and Trends According to historical data, the 30-day performance shows a high of $0.000033 and a low of $0.000027, with a 30-day percentage change of -7.51%. Over the past year, the token reached a high of $0.000152 and a low of $0.000027, representing a yearly change of -54.30%. This indicates significant consolidation after the highs observed in mid-2024.

## Technical Analysis of Support and Resistance The $0.000027 level has acted as a critical support zone recently. Breaking below this point could shift momentum toward historical lows. Conversely, resistance is clustered near the $0.000033 range. To regain bullish momentum, the token must clear these levels with sustained volume.

## Comparison to Peers and Market Context Compared to market peers like Bonk and Shiba Inu, FLOKI exhibits similar cyclical patterns typical of the meme sector. While Shiba Inu often influences the broader category trend, FLOKI has shown independent volatility linked to its internal gaming roadmap.

## Price Scenarios and Market Cap Projections In a base case scenario, the token maintains current support levels while awaiting a shift in general market sentiment. In a bearish scenario, lack of volume could lead to a test of lower support bands. In a bullish case, if the ecosystem attracts new players to its metaverse, the narrative strength may drive the price toward higher resistance levels.

## Key Risk Factors A Risk Score of 6 suggests moderate vulnerability to sudden shifts in the meme sector. Traders should note the volatility index of 20, which warns of potential sharp movements.
